---
id: regenerates-two-factor-backup-codes
title: "Regenerates two-factor backup codes"
description: "Replaces all existing backup codes with a fresh set. Requires the user's current password."

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/users/me/two_factor/backup_codes"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replaces all existing backup codes with a fresh set. Requires the user's current password.
